instruction: Immediately perform a vibration analysis and inspect all mechanical mounting hardware and couplings for looseness or structural fatigue.
Immediately initiate an emergency shutdown and inspect all mounting bolts, bearings, and drive components for signs of mechanical fatigue or misalignment.
Immediate action: Perform a visual inspection of mounting bolts and vibration dampeners, then verify sensor calibration to rule out false readings.
**Action:** Immediately initiate an emergency shutdown and perform a structural integrity inspection of the mounting hardware and drive components.
Inspect the equipment mountings for mechanical looseness and verify alignment.
Inspect and tighten all mounting bolts and coupling alignments immediately to eliminate mechanical resonance.
**Action:** Immediately initiate an emergency shutdown and perform a structural integrity inspection of the mounting bolts and dampening system.
